nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Zechariah, behold they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.

esv.text: Now the rest of the deeds of Zechariah, behold, they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.

cnv.text: 撒迦利雅其餘的事蹟，看哪，都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上。

ccb.text: 撒迦利雅其他的事都记在以色列的列王史上。
